pages.text: The Remote Terminal is a handheld Crafting Terminal for reaching one bound Core without returning to the terminal block.
See $(l:magic_storage:recipes)Recipe Catalog$() for the exact crafting layout.
To bind, hold the Remote Terminal and Shift-right-click the intended Storage Core. The tooltip records its position. Repeat the same action on another Core whenever you want to rebind.

Right-click the bound item to open the full Crafting Terminal. You must remain in the $(thing)same dimension$(), the Core's chunk must be loaded, and the connected network needed for access must still be present.
The binding follows that exact Core. If the Core is destroyed and a different one is placed at the same coordinates, bind again. A closed or unloaded route is not forced open by the Remote Terminal.
